name: koishi-plugin-miyako-mcsmanager
description: Personal MCSManager control plugin for Koishi.
author: miyako

scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:permissions && npm run test:state && npm run test:commands && npm run test:config && npm run test:index
scripts.pack:check: npm run test && npm run build && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run test && npm run build
scripts.pub: npm run test && npm run build && npm publish --access public --provenance

description.en: Control MCSManager Minecraft instances from Koishi.
description.zh: 通过 Koishi 控制 MCSManager Minecraft 实例。
